posts.author: nirl (Nir Lachman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!
We are SO excited to announce Our first iOS Widget - Add Item to a Board!
The new iOS widget allows you to add new Items from anywhere and any time, within only a few clicks!

The widget will be available in the upcoming iOS version – 4.37. Let us know your thoughts – we are excited to hear your feedback!

posts.author: stuttters (Jon Stuttfield)
posts.cookedHtml: This is great - hopefully an indication of functionality coming to desktop soon as well?

posts.author: stuttters (Jon Stuttfield)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this working for anyone? I have version 4.38.1, but no Monday widget.
